description: Bungie.net is Bungie's web platform for game-related account, community, content, clan, forum, and Destiny data and actions. Its public API exposes the same platform functionality used by Bungie.net and companion applications.
summary: Bungie.net exposes one public HTTP API surface, the Bungie.Net API at `https://www.bungie.net/Platform`, authenticated with an application API key and optionally user OAuth 2.0 bearer tokens for protected endpoints.
